page.title: Statistics
page.subtitle: Detailed analysis of visit data and emotional feedback
page.previewDisabledNoVisitors: No visitors recorded for this scope

preview.title: Print preview
preview.hint: “Save PDF” generates the file and opens the save dialog (editable name). “Print…” opens the system dialog (Save as PDF).
preview.dateRangeDesc: This exhibition has no configured dates. Please indicate the period to analyse for the report.
preview.pdfGenerationTimeoutHint: Capture took too long. Close other heavy tabs and try again, or reduce the amount of data shown.
preview.pdfError: Could not generate the PDF. Check external images or try again.
preview.paperFormatHintBrowser: Pick a format, then “Save PDF” or “Print…”.
preview.browserPdfError: Could not generate the PDF in the browser. Retry or use “Print…”.
preview.browserPdfNotReady: Charts are not ready yet. Wait for the full preview, then try again.
preview.popupBlocked: Allow pop-ups for this site to open the PDF.
preview.printPopupBlocked: Allow pop-ups for this site to open the PDF in a new tab.
preview.paperFormatHint: Content is scaled to the printable width for the chosen size; overflow continues on the following pages.

artistCoverLetter.introPrefix: It is a real pleasure for
artistCoverLetter.introMain: to share with you this complete feedback on the emotions your works awakened among visitors to
artistCoverLetter.congrats: Congratulations on all the wonderful reactions your work has sparked!
artistCoverLetter.closingHope: We hope to have the joy of seeing you again very soon at our upcoming exhibitions.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Visitors day by day
timeline.subtitlePdf: From the first to the last day with feedback (preview and PDF — full range)
timeline.totalVisitsFiltered: Cumulative total for filtered period: {{count}} visit(s)

hourly.title: Hourly attendance
hourly.subtitle: Total visits per hour (0–23) across the entire filtered period

cross.title: Emotions / artworks cross table
cross.subtitle: Correlations between artworks and emotions felt by visitors
cross.empty: No real data in this scope.

top.title: Artwork ranking
top.subtitle: Rank, visits and average hearts (real filtered data)
top.empty: No real data in this scope.

common.chartNoData: Not enough data for a chart.

geography.title: Geographic origin of visitors and organisers
geography.disclaimer: Geographic origin is approximate: it is inferred from the visitor's public IP address or, when missing, from the city and country on file. IP addresses may belong to a mobile carrier, VPN or proxy and do not always reflect the actual visit location. Accuracy is usually at city or region level, not an exact address.
geography.mapEmpty: No mappable location for this scope.
